revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十四]][[zh:十二月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 14|qq=December 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|qid=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō|1=Emperor Ankō}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|454|en|454|qid=Q30794|lt=454|1=454}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) – The 20th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Ankō|en|Emperor Ankō|qid=Q361010|lt=Emperor Ankō|1=Emperor Ankō}} , ascends to the throne. * {{ill|Shōan (Japan)|ja|Jōan (era)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōan (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1172|en|1172|qid=Q19687|lt=1172|1=1172}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Tokuko|ja|Heitokuko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Tokuko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , daughter of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , enters the imperial court as the adopted daughter of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Tokuji|en|Tokuji|qid=Q1327170|lt=Tokuji (era)|1=Tokuji}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1307|en|1307|qid=Q5717|lt=1307|1=1307}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}} ) – Due to celestial phenomena, the era name changes from {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|qid=Q1327409|lt=Kagen (Japan)|1=Kagen}} to Tokuji. * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} 15 (Gregorian {{ill|1703|en|1703|qid=Q6822|lt=1703|1=1703}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}} ) – {{ill|Ōishi Yoshio|en|Ōishi Yoshio|qid=Q530128|lt=Ōishi Yoshio|1=Ōishi Yoshio}} and the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3136847}} raid the residence of {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|qid=Q3132109|lt=Kira Yoshinaka|1=Kira Yoshinaka}} , avenging their lord, {{ill|Asano Naganori|en|Asano Naganori|qid=Q2866316|lt=Asano Naganori|1=Asano Naganori}} (the assassination is completed early the following morning). == Births == * {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Emperor Chūai|1=Emperor Chūai}} 9 (Julian {{ill|201|en|201|qid=Q30387|lt=201|1=201}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|qid=Q2202|lt=January 5|1=January 5}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}} , the 15th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (+ {{ill|310|en|310|qid=Q32427|lt=310|1=310}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 3 (Gregorian {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|qid=Q2228|lt=January 7|1=January 7}} ) – {{ill|Ishikawa Masamochi|en|Ishikawa Masamochi|qid=Q6535184|lt=Ishikawa Masamochi|1=Ishikawa Masamochi}} (also known as {{ill|Shukuya Iimori|ja|宿屋飯盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shukuya Iimori|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 石川雅望|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 石川雅望|1=Ishikawa Masamochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6535184}} ), {{ill|kokugaku scholar|ja|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kokugaku scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} (+ {{ill|1830|en|1830|qid=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}} ) – {{ill|Koganei Yoshikiyo|en|Koganei Yoshikiyo|qid=Q6425768|lt=Koganei Yoshikiyo|1=Koganei Yoshikiyo}} , {{ill|anatomist|ja|解剖学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/anatomist|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 解剖学|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 解剖学|1=Anatomy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q514}} and {{ill|Anthropologist|en|Anthropologist|qid=Q4773904|lt=anthropologist|1=Anthropologist}} (+ {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}} ). == Deaths ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|13|12|15|11|14|1|12|1214|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
